title: Zach Bryan Cancels Tulsa Concert Due to ‘Extreme and Dangerous Weather’: ‘If I Had Any Say in This, Things Would Be Different’
summary: Zach Bryan has canceled tonight’s show in Tulsa, OK, due to “extreme and dangerous weather,” stating that he’s being “forced” to call off the performance and that he doesn’t “have a choice in the matter.” The show was slated to take place at the H.A. Chapman Stadium in Tulsa this evening as part of…
